text:
A few new things in the garden this week. We plugged in GPT 5.6 and Seedream 5 Pro, and finally moved Gemini over to its GA endpoint. 

The CLI now handles Quest rewards properly, and we cached the model health checks so things feel a bit snappier. Also added JustScriptzz, riofndev, and solarnode-developement to the community models allowlist. 

Keep building. Everything's open on GitHub. 🌱

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #stardewvalley #llm #github #buildinpublic
